testcase.name: Chat Page — Auth Guard › unauthenticated user is redirected from /chat to /login
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › chat-auth-guard.spec.ts:12:7 › Chat Page — Auth Guard › unauthenticated user is redirected from /chat to /login
Error: expect(page).toHaveURL(expected) failed
Expected: "http://localhost:3000/login" Received: "http://localhost:3000/chat" Timeout: 8000ms
Call log: - Expect "toHaveURL" with timeout 8000ms 11 × unexpected value "http://localhost:3000/chat"
18 | await page.goto('/chat') 19 | // The layout catches the error and redirects > 20 | await expect(page).toHaveURL('/login', { timeout: 8000 }) | ^ 21 | }) 22 | 23 | test('unauthenticated user accessing /chat/some-id is redirected to /login', async ({ page }) => { at /home/addy/code/patra-saar/apps/web/e2e/chat-auth-guard.spec.ts:20:24

Retry #1 ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error: expect(page).toHaveURL(expected) failed
Expected: "http://localhost:3000/login" Received: "http://localhost:3000/chat" Timeout: 8000ms
Call log: - Expect "toHaveURL" with timeout 8000ms 11 × unexpected value "http://localhost:3000/chat"
18 | await page.goto('/chat') 19 | // The layout catches the error and redirects > 20 | await expect(page).toHaveURL('/login', { timeout: 8000 }) | ^ 21 | }) 22 | 23 | test('unauthenticated user accessing /chat/some-id is redirected to /login', async ({ page }) => { at /home/addy/code/patra-saar/apps/web/e2e/chat-auth-guard.spec.ts:20:24

testcase.name: Chat Page — Auth Guard › unauthenticated user accessing /chat/some-id is redirected to /login
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › chat-auth-guard.spec.ts:23:7 › Chat Page — Auth Guard › unauthenticated user accessing /chat/some-id is redirected to /login
Error: expect(page).toHaveURL(expected) failed
Expected: "http://localhost:3000/login" Received: "http://localhost:3000/chat/some-fake-id" Timeout: 8000ms
Call log: - Expect "toHaveURL" with timeout 8000ms 11 × unexpected value "http://localhost:3000/chat/some-fake-id"
27 | 28 | await page.goto('/chat/some-fake-id') > 29 | await expect(page).toHaveURL('/login', { timeout: 8000 }) | ^ 30 | }) 31 | 32 | test('authenticated user sees chat UI on /chat', async ({ page }) => { at /home/addy/code/patra-saar/apps/web/e2e/chat-auth-guard.spec.ts:29:24

testcase.name: Chat Page — Auth Guard › authenticated user sees chat UI on /chat
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › chat-auth-guard.spec.ts:32:7 › Chat Page — Auth Guard › authenticated user sees chat UI on /chat
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: getByText('PatraSaar') Expected: visible Timeout: 8000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 8000ms - waiting for getByText('PatraSaar')
53 | await expect(page).toHaveURL('/chat') 54 | // Sidebar logo should be visible > 55 | await expect(page.getByText('PatraSaar')).toBeVisible() | ^ 56 | }) 57 | 58 | test('authenticated user sees chat sidebar with "New chat" button', async ({ page }) => { at /home/addy/code/patra-saar/apps/web/e2e/chat-auth-guard.spec.ts:55:47

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › chat-auth-guard.spec.ts:58:7 › Chat Page — Auth Guard › authenticated user sees chat sidebar with "New chat" button
